/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/kingo-tray.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/kingo-tray.dir/kingo-tray_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kingo-tray.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kingo-tray.dir/appcore.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kingo-tray.dir/kingo-tray_autogen/EWIEGA46WW/qrc_resources.cpp.o" -o kingo-tray  /usr/lib/libQt5QuickControls2.so.5.15.19 libipcclient.a /usr/lib/libQt5Quick.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5QmlModels.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Qml.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Network.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Core.so.5.15.19
